name: User Maintenance
description: Create, modify, or display SAP user accounts. Manage logon data, roles, profiles, and lock status.

name: Authorization Check
description: Display the last failed authorization check for a user. Essential first step when a user reports an access or permission error.

name: Role Maintenance
description: Create, edit, and assign SAP roles. Manage authorizations within roles and regenerate authorization profiles.

name: Transport Organizer
description: Create, manage, and release Workbench transport requests. Used for ABAP objects, programs, and repository objects.

name: Customizing Transport Organizer
description: Manage Customizing transport requests. Used for configuration and IMG settings.

name: Transport Management System
description: Manage the transport landscape, import queues, and perform imports across systems. Check import logs.

name: ABAP Runtime Error Analysis
description: Display and analyze ABAP short dumps (runtime errors). Investigate program crashes with full stack trace and variable contents.

name: Background Job Overview
description: Monitor, analyze, and manage background jobs. Check job status, view job logs, cancel or reschedule jobs.

name: System Log
description: View the SAP system log. Track system-level errors, failed logons, updates, and critical events across all clients.

name: Work Process Overview
description: Monitor all active work processes in the current application server. Check for hung or long-running processes.

name: Global Work Process Overview
description: Monitor work processes across all application servers. Used for system-wide performance checks.

name: Lock Entry List
description: Display and delete SAP enqueue lock entries. Use when a table entry is stuck locked after a failed transaction.

name: RFC Destinations
description: Configure and test RFC (Remote Function Call) connections to other SAP systems or external services.

name: ABAP Editor
description: Create, edit, and execute ABAP programs and reports. Check source code and run programs directly.

name: Object Navigator
description: Browse and manage all SAP development repository objects: programs, function groups, classes, interfaces, and more.

name: General Table Display
description: Display the contents of any SAP database table or view. Useful for checking configuration, master data, and document tables.

name: ABAP Data Dictionary
description: Display and maintain ABAP Dictionary objects: tables, structures, data elements, domains, and search helps.

name: Customizing / IMG
description: Access the Implementation Guide (IMG) for SAP configuration. Navigate to configuration activities by module.

name: HTTP Service Configuration
description: Activate, deactivate, and configure Internet Communication Framework (ICF) services. Required for OData, Fiori, and web services.

name: OData Service Builder
description: Build and maintain OData services in SAP Gateway. Define entity types, associations, and service operations.

name: Activate and Maintain Services
description: Activate and manage OData services on the Gateway hub. Register backend services and configure service endpoints.

name: Backend Gateway Cache Cleanup
description: Clear the OData metadata cache on the backend system. Run when OData service changes are not reflected.

name: Gateway Frontend Cache Cleanup
description: Clear the OData metadata cache on the Gateway frontend. Run after backend cache cleanup for a full refresh.

name: Display FI Document
description: Display a posted Financial Accounting document. View header, line items, G/L accounts, and posting keys.

name: Enter G/L Account Document
description: Post a manual G/L journal entry. Used for adjustments, accruals, and corrections directly in the general ledger.

name: G/L Account Balance Display
description: Display the balance of a G/L account by period. Shows debit/credit totals and period movements.

name: G/L Account Line Items
description: Display line items posted to a G/L account. Filter by open, cleared, or all items. Drill into individual documents.

name: Vendor Line Items
description: Display vendor (accounts payable) line items. View open invoices, payments, and cleared items by vendor.

name: Customer Line Items
description: Display customer (accounts receivable) line items. View open invoices, payments, and cleared items by customer.

name: Automatic Payment Program
description: Run the automatic payment program to process vendor payments and generate payment documents. Configure payment parameters, proposal, and payment run.

name: Logistics Invoice Verification
description: Enter and post vendor invoices against purchase orders and goods receipts. Three-way match between PO, GR, and invoice.

name: Display Internal Order
description: Display internal order master data: category, responsible cost center, budget, and status.

name: Project Builder
description: Create, display, and maintain SAP projects and WBS elements. Used for project management, budgeting, and PS reporting.

name: Display Purchase Order
description: Display an existing purchase order. View header data, line items, delivery schedules, conditions, and confirmation status.

name: Create Purchase Order
description: Create a new purchase order manually. Specify vendor, material, quantity, delivery details, and account assignment.

name: Change Purchase Order
description: Modify an existing purchase order. Change quantities, dates, conditions, and account assignments on open POs.

name: Goods Movement
description: Post goods receipts, goods issues, stock transfers, and returns. The central transaction for all physical stock movements.

name: Material Document List
description: Display a list of material documents (stock movements) by material, plant, movement type, or date range.

name: Warehouse Stocks of Material
description: Display stock overview of materials across storage locations and plants. Shows unrestricted, blocked, and quality inspection stock.

name: Stock Overview
description: Display a complete stock overview for a material across all plants, storage locations, and stock types.

name: Display Material Master
description: Display the material master record across all views: basic data, purchasing, MRP, accounting, and plant data.

name: Display Sales Order
description: Display an existing sales order. View header, item details, delivery status, billing status, and conditions.

name: Create Sales Order
description: Create a new sales order. Enter sold-to party, material, quantity, and pricing. Choose order type (e.g., OR for standard).

name: Change Sales Order
description: Modify an existing sales order. Change quantities, dates, conditions, and delivery data on open orders.

name: Display Billing Document
description: Display a billing document (customer invoice or credit/debit memo). View header, items, accounting document, and revenue.

name: Display Outbound Delivery
description: Display an outbound delivery document. View picking status, goods issue status, and shipping details.

name: Display Pricing Conditions
description: Display pricing condition records used in sales order pricing. Check valid prices, discounts, and surcharges.

name: Display Cost Center
description: Display cost center master data including controlling area assignment, responsible manager, and validity period.

name: Create Cost Center
description: Create a new cost center. Define controlling area assignment, category, responsible person, and hierarchy.

name: Display Cost Center Group
description: Display cost center groups (hierarchies) used in reporting, planning, and allocations.

name: CATS: Time Sheet Entry
description: Enter working times and activities in the Cross-Application Time Sheet (CATS). Used for project time recording and HR time management.

name: Maintain HR Master Data
description: Maintain employee master data infotypes: personal data, org assignment, payroll, and contract info.

name: Display HR Master Data
description: Display employee master data in read-only mode. View any infotype for an employee without change rights.

name: Personnel Actions
description: Execute HR actions such as hiring, transfers, promotions, and terminations. Chains all relevant infotype updates together.

name: Organization and Staffing
description: Display and maintain the organizational chart. Manage org units, positions, relationships, and reporting lines.

name: Quota Overview
description: Display an employee's leave and absence quota balances. Shows accrued, used, and remaining quota by absence type.

name: Time Evaluation
description: Run or check time evaluation for employees. Processes time data to calculate overtime, absences, and quota accruals.

name: Workload Analysis for Workflow
description: Analyze workflow workitems by task, agent, or status. Identify stuck, unprocessed, or error workflow items.

name: Execute Workitem Administratively
description: Execute, forward, or complete a workflow workitem with administrator rights. Used to unblock stuck workflows.

name: IDoc List
description: Display and analyze IDocs by status, message type, partner, and date. Standard starting point for investigating interface processing issues.

name: IDoc List by Message Type
description: Display IDocs with flexible selection by basic type, message type, partner, and status. Often used together with WE02 for deeper filtering.

name: Status Monitor for ALE Messages
description: Reprocess failed IDocs after the root cause has been fixed. Used when an inbound or outbound IDoc is in an error status and needs to be retried.

name: Update Requests
description: Display failed or pending SAP update requests. Essential for diagnosing transactions that appeared to save but were not committed to the database.

name: Release Purchase Order
description: Approve or release a purchase order according to the configured release strategy. Used when a PO is blocked from further processing pending approval.

name: Release Blocked Invoices
description: Release invoices blocked for payment due to quantity or price variance after the underlying issue has been resolved.

name: Business Partner
description: Create, change, and display Business Partner master data. Central object in S/4HANA for customers, vendors, and other partner roles.

name: SAP Business Workplace
description: Open the SAP inbox to process workflow workitems, notifications, and business documents assigned to the user.

name: Create Material Master
description: Create a new material master record across required views such as Basic Data, Purchasing, MRP, and Accounting.

name: Change Material Master
description: Change an existing material master record. Update plant views, purchasing data, MRP settings, accounting data, and more.

name: Enter Vendor Invoice
description: Post a vendor invoice directly in Financial Accounting. Used for non-PO invoices or manual AP postings.

name: Output Controller
description: Display and manage spool requests and print output. Use when a report ran but the expected output is missing, stuck, or not printed.

name: User Information System
description: Search users, roles, profiles, and authorization assignments. Useful for analyzing who has access to a transaction, role, or authorization object.

name: SAP Directories
description: Browse application server directories and interface files. Useful for checking inbound and outbound file interfaces and file availability.

name: Application Log
description: Display application logs written by SAP programs and interfaces. Useful when a process failed but there is no short dump and the business transaction gives limited information.

name: qRFC Monitor (Outbound Queue)
description: Monitor outbound qRFC queues. Use when messages or queued calls are stuck before leaving the source system.

name: qRFC Monitor (Inbound Queue)
description: Monitor inbound qRFC queues. Use when messages arrived in the target system but are stuck waiting for processing.

name: Test Tool for IDoc Processing
description: Create and test IDoc processing manually. Useful for reproducing interface issues and retesting IDoc scenarios in a controlled way.

name: Create Purchase Requisition
description: Create a new purchase requisition for materials or services. Used as the first purchasing document before approval and conversion to a purchase order.

name: Change Purchase Requisition
description: Change an existing purchase requisition. Update quantities, dates, account assignments, and other purchasing details.

name: Display Purchase Requisition
description: Display an existing purchase requisition including release status, item details, account assignments, and follow-on processing data.

name: Release Purchase Requisition
description: Approve or release a purchase requisition according to the configured release strategy.

name: Stock/Requirements List
description: Display current stock, planned receipts, reservations, and requirements for a material in a plant. Useful for understanding shortages and demand coverage.

name: Single-Item, Multi-Level Planning
description: Run MRP planning for a material across multi-level BOM structures. Use when demand and supply need to be recalculated.

name: Create Outbound Delivery
description: Create an outbound delivery for a sales order or stock transport process. Used before picking and goods issue.

name: Change Outbound Delivery
description: Change an existing outbound delivery. Used for picking, packing, dates, and posting goods issue.

name: Create Billing Document
description: Create a billing document from delivery or sales order data. Used when an invoice should be generated after logistics processing.

name: Open and Close FI Posting Periods
description: Maintain posting period controls for Financial Accounting. Used to allow or block document posting by period and account type.

name: Absence Quotas (Infotype 2006)
description: Maintain or review absence quota information such as leave entitlement and remaining balances through HR master data maintenance.

name: Display Organization and Staffing
description: Display the organizational structure, positions, and holder assignments in a read-only view. Useful for checking where an employee sits in the org structure.

name: Mass User Maintenance
description: Maintain multiple SAP users at once. Useful for mass unlocks, role assignments, validity changes, and password administration across many users.

name: Workload and Performance Analysis
description: Analyze workload, response times, transaction performance, and system activity over time. Useful for identifying slow transactions and performance hotspots.

name: Performance Trace
description: Trace SQL, RFC, enqueue, and buffer accesses for a transaction or user session. Used for detailed technical performance investigation.

name: SAP Servers
description: Display all active application servers in the SAP system and jump to administration functions on a selected instance.

name: Gateway Error Log
description: Display runtime errors for SAP Gateway OData requests. Useful when a service is active but returns backend or processing errors.

name: SAPconnect Send Requests
description: Monitor outbound emails, faxes, and other SAPconnect messages. Check whether messages are waiting, failed, or already sent.

name: SAPconnect Administration
description: Maintain SAPconnect settings such as SMTP nodes, send jobs, and outbound communication configuration.

name: Workflow Log / Selection Report
description: Display workflow instances and their detailed execution logs. Useful for understanding where a workflow failed or stopped.

name: List of Sales Orders
description: Display a list of sales orders by customer, material, date, and status. Useful for locating an order when the document number is unknown.

name: Release Sales Documents from Credit Management
description: Review and release sales documents blocked by credit management. Used when a sales order is held due to credit limit issues.

name: Purchase Orders by PO Number
description: Display a report of purchase orders using flexible selection criteria. Useful when searching or monitoring POs in bulk.

name: Purchase Orders by Vendor
description: Display purchase orders for a specific vendor using reporting selections and status filters.

name: Purchase Orders by Material
description: Display purchase orders for a specific material. Useful for procurement analysis and tracking ordered quantities by material.

name: Close MM Period
description: Close the current Materials Management period and open the next period for inventory posting. Relevant when MM postings fail due to period issues.

name: Reverse Accounting Document
description: Reverse a posted accounting document in Financial Accounting. Used when a posted FI document needs to be canceled.

name: Post Outgoing Payment
description: Post a manual outgoing payment to a vendor, including invoice clearing and payment difference handling.

name: Post Incoming Payment
description: Post a manual incoming customer payment and clear open receivables.

name: Approve Working Times
description: Approve submitted CATS timesheet entries. Used when time data requires workflow or managerial approval before downstream transfer.

name: Change Time Data
description: Maintain employee time data such as absences and attendances through HR time infotypes.
